title: AI-powered justice is a double-edged sword.
description:
AI-assisted lawsuits are flooding the legal system. Good news for the people able to file without costly lawyers — and bad news for the already overwhelmed court system. Interesting read from the NYT here, though the issue has been simmering away for a while now. Maybe it’s time for AI judges?
[Link: Artificial Intelligence Floods Court Dockets with Home-Brewed Lawsuits | https://www.nytimes.com/2026/05/25/us/politics/artificial-intelliegence-courts.html | nytimes.com]
content:

title: OpenAI's Altman says AI unlikely to lead to 'jobs apocalypse'
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman did not cite any jobs numbers but has previously talked about potential industry-wide job cuts due to the advancement of artificial intelligence
content:
SYDNEY, Australia – OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said on Tuesday, May 26, the rapid development and adoption of AI would not lead to a global “jobs apocalypse” and the technology had not claimed as many white-collar jobs as he had feared.
Speaking virtually... [2479 chars]

title: No jobs apocalypse: Sam Altman says AI may not trigger the mass unemployment many feared
description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says artificial intelligence has not wiped out white-collar jobs as quickly as he once feared. Speaking at a conference in Australia, Altman admitted he may have overestimated AI’s early impact on employment, even as companies worldwide continue replacing some roles with automation and generative AI systems.
content: For years, Silicon Valley has warned the world that artificial intelligence could replace millions of office workers, automate white-collar professions and reshape employment faster than societies could adapt. But now, one of AI’s most influential fi... [4549 chars]

title: AI-Led Stock Rally Changing Global Market Valuations: Sebi Chief
description: The global rally in artificial intelligence (AI) stocks is changing stock market rankings across countries, said Securities and Exchange Board of India (Sebi) Chairperson Tuhin Kanta Pandey. He said the valuations of semiconductor and AI-related companies have risen sharply worldwide
content:

title: Ohio 2026 election could feature more AI campaign ads
description: Artificial intelligence is becoming more common in political campaigns. And it's already popping up in Ohio's 2026 election.
content:
Political campaigns are increasingly using artificial intelligence to create content like ads and memes.
Experts are concerned that AI could be used to mislead voters and manipulate public opinion.
AI tools can also help campaigns save time and money... [5272 chars]

title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Calls Linking AI to Job Cuts a ‘Lazy Narrative’
description: Concerns over AI-related job losses have increased in recent months as several companies announced workforce reductions while expanding investments in artificial intelligence technologies.
content: As artificial intelligence continues to disrupt the tech world, bringing about a change in the job landscape, one of the most prominent voices in the sector, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, has questioned linking AI to job cuts. Speaking to Channel News Asi... [3073 chars]

title: Raghuram Rajan: The AI investment boom may lead to an industry shake-up. Not every player will survive
description: Huge investments are being made across the artificial intelligence (AI) supply chain, led by euphoric visions of exceptional profits. However, paths to profit do not look uniformly convincing. We can expect a grand shake up at some point that leaves only a few players in the fray.
